title: Golden Globe Nominations 2026: The Full List of Nominees
text: The nominees for Best Director – Motion Picture at the 2026 Golden Globes are Paul Thomas Anderson ('One Battle After Another'), Ryan Coogler ('Sinners'), Guillermo del Toro ('Frankenstein'), Jafar Panahi ('It Was Just an Accident'), Joachim Trier ('Sentimental Value'), and Chloé Zhao ('Hamnet'). The field features an accomplished mix of established auteurs and acclaimed contemporary filmmakers. Anderson and del Toro represent veteran directors with multiple accolades, while Coogler brings momentum from recent blockbuster success. Panahi's inclusion highlights international cinema recognition, and both Trier and Zhao represent the current generation of critically acclaimed storytellers. Notably, 'One Battle After Another' appears throughout the ceremony with substantial recognition—it received multiple nominations across acting, screenplay, and score categories. Paul Thomas Anderson leads the directorial race, suggesting strong industry support overall. The diversity in the nominees reflects the Golden Globes' expanded scope, recognizing filmmakers working across different genres and geographies.
